title: carduus lusitanicus subsp. lusitanicus
intro: Carduus lusitanicus subsp. lusitanicus, also known as the Portuguese thistle, is a plant species within the Carduus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, and is believed to offer benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting liver health. The herbal preparations of Carduus lusitanicus subsp. lusitanicus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or externally to harness its medicinal properties.
